76 70 87 09 87 20 0A B1 02 10 09 05 01 71 14 72 
C8 21 00 71 87 52 70 87 20 71 A5 FF FF 

76 			; Set Speed to Walk
70 
87 09 
87 20 
0A 
B1 02 		; Set Character Sprite
10 
09 			; Display Character
05 01		; Hop Anim, xx: Direction (06: Long Hop)
71 
14 			; Character Pose
72 
C8 21 00 	; Show Text
71 
87 52
70 
87 20 		; Boco Head Nod
71 
A5 FF		; Clear event flag 1ff
FF
